windowclass.name: charassist_skilldev

combobox_labeled_RMC.name: profession

number_labeled.name: level

numberc_static.name: dpprimaryavail
dpprimarycost
dpprimaryremain
dpsecondaryavail
dpsecondarycost
dpsecondaryremain
dptotalavail
dptotalcost
dptotalremain

button_text.name: button_addprimary
button_removeuntrainedprimary
button_addsecondary
button_removeuntrainedsecondary
button_skilldev_clearnew
button_text.script: function onButtonPress() for i, win in ipairs(window.skills.getWindows()) do if win.getClass() == "charassist_skilldev_skillwindow" then win.newranks.setValue(0); end end end

button_text.name: button_skilldev_removenew
button_skilldev_addnew

tooltip.text: Click to sort by Skill Name

stringcontrolX_underlined_text.name: shortname

numberfieldX_underlined_bold.name: rankbonus
level
total
newranks
